name: Pokemon Girls Hunter
description:
You're a Pokemon champ from Kanto who took a trip in Puella, a region full of girls with few boys. 
Upon arriving the Puella authorities offered you a mission, a mission to capture female trainers who use human balls to capture trainers.. and in return youve been allowed by the Puellan authorities to keep the offender as your own slave to teach her her own medicine! 
**Capture lawbreakers as your own and free their captured trainer! Have a harem of captives along the way!**

(PS this is my attempt to simulate the game or the rom hack named Pokemon Girl Hunter as an rpg bot,  reviews needed to improve it)

**bot needs fixing atm**
creator: ArcVengerXD
